description: Canonical machine-readable action dictionary for the governance board and execution system.

READ_REPO_STATE.description: Read repository state, files, workflow definitions, and tracked artifacts without mutating repo state.

PROPOSE_TASK.description: Create canonical TASK_PROPOSED artifacts for roadmap-driven work.

APPROVE_PRE_ACTION.description: Approve or reject a pre-action proposal before execution starts.

EXECUTE_APPROVED_CHANGE.description: Perform approved repository or workflow changes within the execution contour.

WRITE_LEDGER_EVENT.description: Write validated governance events to exchange_ledger.csv through the canonical ledger writer.

ROUTE_NEXT_ACTOR.description: Route the next canonical actor through transport-only workflow dispatch.

NOTIFY_OPERATOR.description: Produce operator-facing handoff or notification records without making audit or implementation decisions.

CLOSE_TASK.description: Close a task after accepted result and completed governance flow.

BLOCK_EMERGENCY.description: Block execution or workflow progression under emergency or policy breach conditions.
